elements.original_description: A cartoon character with a shocked expression holding a dollar bill, with a red 'X' mark over their mouth. Pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon, clean flat vector art of a cartoon character with a shocked expression holding a dollar bill, with a red 'X' mark over their mouth. Pure white background, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks, highly detailed and symbolic, emphasizing a taboo or forbidden communication theme.
